title: Exploring the potential of public proteomics data.
author: Vaudel M Verheggen K Csordas A Raeder H Berven FS Martens L Vizcaino JA Barsnes H
content: S-EPMC4738454 PMC4738454 Exploring the potential of public proteomics data. In a global effort for scientific transparency, it has become feasible and good practice to share experimental data supporting novel findings.
